name: Random Game Length
notes: Starting at the end of the fifth round, roll a D6 at the end of each round and add the round number to the roll.
If the result is greater or equal to 10, the battle ends immediately, elseway, the battle continues one more round.

name: Break Point
notes: At the beginning of any Start of Turn sub-phase, if the remaining Unit Strength of either army has fallen below 25%, the battle ends immediately.
If only one army has reached its Break Point, its remaining units begin flee, crumble to dust, etc.
If both armies have reached their Break Points, the Victory Points are totalled as normal, but the results will be Marginal (Victory/Loss).
